sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the current positions of the blue squares. They might be at different positions now since they moved independently.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current positions
for node in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'S':
        b = node['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Blue square id={node['id']} bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")

# Let me look at the full black shape to understand the structure
# I need to find the "eye socket" positions - maybe there are specific spots
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
# Print the full black shape region
for i in range(9, 59):
    row_str = ascii_lines[i]
    # Find the black region in this row
    black_start = None
    black_end = None
    for j, c in enumerate(row_str):
        if c == 'B':
            if black_start is None:
                black_start = j
            black_end = j
    if black_start is not None:
        print(f"{i:2d}: cols {black_start}-{black_end}: {row_str[black_start:black_end+1]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
